name: CONTRACT-BUG-32
title: check-no-main-edits.py forbids 'trunk' and 'develop' but only spec says main/master
description: scripts/enforcement/check-no-main-edits.py line 32 rejects 'main', 'master', 'trunk', 'develop' branches. Spec docstring (lines 3-5) only mentions main/master. The rule is broader than declared. Either narrow the code to main/master or update the script docstring/spec to reflect the broader set.

history.note: Fixed Wave 3 batch 2: schema permissiveness, template fields, enforcement script corrections per Inv 22-33.
